infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to show spring overlays on your camera view.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to find springs near you and show overlays in camera mode.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Used for compass heading in the camera overlay.

plugins.cameraPermission: HotSpring Lens needs camera access to show spring overlays on your view.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HotSpring Lens needs your location to find nearby springs and power the camera overlay.
